Supermic+more: PDM Bitstream ASICs for Audio Signal Processing

September 1, 2024

Eight signal processing ASICs fabricated on the Skywater 130nm CMOS process via Tiny Tapeout 8, targeting beamforming and audio DSP for hearing aids.

clEar: Glasses-Based Beamforming Hearing Aids

May 1, 2024

Beamforming hearing aids using a glasses-based microphone array to improve speech clarity and spatial context for the hard of hearing.
